description_long: This vending machine is a rectangular, upright unit with a predominantly black exterior and a large, visually striking front panel. The front features a photographic graphic of a beverage being poured over ice, with the word 'FROSTY' in bold white letters at the bottom. A product retrieval slot is located near the lower center, while a vertical column of product selection buttons and a small digital display are positioned on the right side of the front face. The sides and back of the machine are plain black, with no visible openings or features. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for placement in urban public spaces.
description: A modern black vending machine with a large beverage-themed graphic, product selection buttons, and a retrieval slot on the front.
description_view_0: The front view shows the beverage graphic, product selection buttons, digital display, and the retrieval slot, all clearly visible.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a plain, solid black surface with no visible features or openings.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a flat, featureless black panel, indicating the back of the machine.
description_view_3: The right side view is similar to the left, showing a plain black surface without any distinguishing features.
attribute_display_panel: A small rectangular digital display is located on the upper right section of the front panel, above the product selection buttons.
attribute_payment_interface: A payment interface is present below the display panel, featuring a slot that likely accepts coins or bills, and possibly a card reader, all vertically aligned on the right side of the front face.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: A vertical row of individual rectangular buttons, each with a distinct color or label, is located on the right side of the front panel for product selection.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A wide, rectangular retrieval slot with a slightly recessed opening is located near the bottom center of the front panel.
attribute_branding_or_signage: The front panel features a large beverage graphic and the word 'FROSTY' in bold white letters at the bottom, serving as branding and signage.
